mapper.insert: insert into score_record ( submit_id, score, comment, grade_time ) values ( #{submitId}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{gradeTime} )
mapper.select:
select hs.id as submitId, h.title as homeworkTitle, c.course_name as courseName, sr.score as score, sr.comment as comment, sr.grade_time as gradeTime from homework_submit hs
left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id
where hs.student_id = #{studentId}
order by hs.id desc

select hs.id as submitId, h.title as homeworkTitle, c.course_name as courseName, u.real_name as studentName, hs.submit_content as submitContent, sr.score as score, sr.comment as comment, sr.grade_time as gradeTime, hs.grade_status as gradeStatus from homework_submit hs left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id left join course c on h.course_id = c.id left join user u on hs.student_id = u.id left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by hs.id desc
